headline: Here’s Why Cigna (CI) is Among the 12 Most Undervalued Stocks to Invest In
summary: The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) is one of the 12 Most Undervalued Stocks to Invest In. On May 20, 2026, Morgan Stanley raised the firm’s price target on The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) to $361 from $355 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. Morgan Stanley said meetings with management “reinforced the underappreciated” specialty opportunity. The […]
